summary: Iteration 47 - Demande d'accès bénéficiaire RE'ACTIF PRO flow testing. All 16 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: two buttons in header (Demande d'accès + Création manuelle), search by name dialog, 'Compte ouvert autorisé' badge, 'Synchroniser' button, Privacy settings with name fields when 'Limité' selected.

issues: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby (console warning) - cosmetic only

test_credentials: Partenaire: test@missionlocale.fr / Solerys777!, Particulier: bob15 / Solerys777!
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users. bob15 set to limited visibility with real_first_name=Robert, real_last_name=Dupont.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demande d'accès flow fully functional. Two buttons in partenaire header: 'Demande d'accès bénéficiaire RE'ACTIF PRO' (data-testid='demande-acces-btn') and 'Création manuelle' (data-testid='add-beneficiaire-btn'). Search endpoint /api/partenaires/demande-acces/search searches by real name and returns only users with visibility_level='limited' or 'public'. Sync endpoint /api/partenaires/demande-acces/synchroniser creates beneficiary with synced=True. Privacy settings shows name fields when 'Limité' is selected with warning about anonymat levée.
